problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus — specifically Sleep-dependent memory consolidation — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
